comments: Approved. The objective is tightly bounded to a read-only integration test client that consumes the existing MCP context APIs via stdio, specifically get_dispatch_state and get_execution_diff. allowed_files is correctly restricted to only src/mcp-server/src/test-client.ts. Workflow/result artifacts are segregated into allowed_artifacts only, with tasks/v0.5-m4-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.5-m4-result-review-packet.json separated from implementation files. out_of_scope correctly forbids workflow mutation, approval automation, reviewer identity redesign, and protocol/schema overhaul, matching the approval and kickoff constraints. No contract expansion beyond the approved M4 scope was found.
